name: NATURAL ALTERNATIVES INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: Natural Alternatives International, Inc. (NAI) is a leading formulator, manufacturer, and marketer of nutritional supplements, providing private-label contract manufacturing services to companies selling vitamins, minerals, herbal, and other nutritional supplements globally. NAI also owns a patent estate for beta-alanine, commercialized under the CarnoSyn, SR CarnoSyn, and TriBsyn trademarks through direct sales, royalty, and licensing agreements. The company operates manufacturing facilities in Vista and Carlsbad, California, and Manno, Switzerland.

products.name: CarnoSyn
products.description: Instant-release beta-alanine raw material ingredient sold under trademark with patent licensing rights.

products.name: SR CarnoSyn
products.description: Sustained-release beta-alanine raw material ingredient sold directly and licensed to third parties.

products.name: TriBsyn
products.description: New form of CarnoSyn beta-alanine offered as capsule products in business-to-business private label format.

products.name: Private-label contract manufacturing
products.description: Custom nutritional supplement manufacturing services including formulation, testing, packaging, and regulatory support for third-party brands.

products.name: SustainedRx / Perfect Synergy
products.description: Branded SR CarnoSyn wellness tablet product sold direct-to-consumer; discontinued during fiscal 2025.

partnerships.description: GMP registration and NSF Certified for Sport certification for Vista, California facility since 2002.
GMP certification enabling export to Pharmaceutical Inspection Convention countries including European and Pacific Rim nations.
GMP certification for compliance with Canadian Natural Health Products Regulations since December 2011.
Organic Processor and Handler certification meeting USDA National Organic Program standards since March 2015.
